violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use 3-bay sink until dish machine is repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Per PIC, establishment is in the process of getting someone registered with the state. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
The bar is lacking a hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap (Currently has air break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
